signals.headline: Bank of Korea Projects Inflation to Rise to Mid-to-High 2% Range in 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Projects Inflation to Rise to Mid-to-High 2% Range in 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board announced on April 10, 2026, that **inflation is expected to rise to the mid-to-high 2% range** this year, significantly exceeding its February forecast of 2.2%[3].
